theme: National Milk Chocolate with Almonds Day
haiku:
Rich chocolate melts slow,
Crunchy almonds entwined sweet,
Joyful bites await.
Happy #NationalMilkChocolateWithAlmondsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful pixels dance,
Joyful worlds beyond the screen,
Adventure awaits.
Happy #VideoGamesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful waves of light,
Whispers of the soft, cool breeze,
Words dance in the night.
#HappyBirthdayPercyByssheShelley from @ClamBakeSanta

Sweet dough rolls and hugs,
Frosting swirls in colors bright,
Joyful bites of bliss.
Happy #NationalSugarCookieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunshine on bare skin,
Gentle breeze through the warm air,
Freedom feels like joy.
Happy #NationalNoBraDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Electric sparks fly,
Whispers of a bright future,
Genius lights the way.
#HappyBirthdayNikolaTesla from @ClamBakeSanta

Coconut whispers,
Tropical sun warms the sand,
Cheers rise with sweet sips.
Happy #NationalPinaColadaDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Soft paws on warm laps,
Purring whispers fill the air,
Joyful leaps abound.
Happy #InternationalKittenDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Brush strokes paint the dawn,
Warm hues of joy and laughter,
Nature's art unveiled.
#HappyBirthdayCamillePissarro from @ClamBakeSanta

Blue berries glisten,
Soft muffins fresh from the pan,
Warm smiles fill the air.
Happy #NationalBlueberryMuffinDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful laughter rings,
Warm hugs wrap like soft blankets,
Hopeful hearts unite.
Happy #CheerUpTheLonelyDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Bright balloons in joyful arcs,
Cheers for you today!
#HappyBirthdayJohnQuincyAdams from @ClamBakeSanta

Nuts and spices blend,
Warm aromas fill the air,
Slice of joy served right.
Happy #PecanPieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Leaves flutter gently,
As sunlight warms the soft earth,
Nature’s gift abounds.
#HappyBirthdayHenryDavidThoreau from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright blooms paint the sky,
Laughter wraps like a warm hug,
Joy’s feast fills the air.
#HappyBirthdayPabloNeruda from @ClamBakeSanta

Crispy bites delight,
Dipping sauces swirl and twirl,
Laughter fills the air.
Happy #NationalFrenchFriesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright screens softly glow,
Laughter fills the cozy room,
Dreams take flight and soar.
Happy #EmbraceYourGeeknessDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright candles flicker,
Laughter swirls like warm breezes,
Stories bloom like spring.
#HappyBirthdayWoleSoyinka from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden cheese will shine,
Butter swirls through warm pasta,
A hug on your plate.
Happy #NationalMacaroniAndCheeseDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright strings strum the air,
Songs of dust and open roads,
Hearts lift with each note.
#HappyBirthdayWoodyGuthrie from @ClamBakeSanta

Gentle night unfolds,
Stars peek through velvet curtains,
Dreams bloom in the dark.
Happy #NewMoon from @ClamBakeSanta
